spec: Non-inverting amplifier using AD8092 with a closed-loop gain of 5 V/V (~13.98 dB), +/-5V supplies. Choose a test input amplitude and frequency well within the part's linear range (avoid slew-rate limiting: keep the signal small, e.g. 100mV, and test at 1 MHz or below).
